name: Homemade Pesto and Pasta
method: Combine ingredients (except for the tomatoes) in a blender and whizz for a minute, and set aside. This is enough pesto for 2-3 people, double or triple if you need more. Please note that most of my recipes serve 2-3. Boil water for pasta, ziti, penne, or farfalle pasta are all good choices, I like to use penne. Spoon the pesto over the top and mix thoroughly to coat the pasta. Top with fresh tomatoes cut in half and grated parmesan. Serving suggestion: fresh bread and salad. You can eat this dish hot, or cold. Serves 2-3. Olé
